name: Friendly African Elephant
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: a friendly African elephant standing in profile, large fan-shaped ears spread wide, a long curling trunk, two curved tusks, a big round body on four sturdy legs, and a small tufted tail, looking calm and gentle

name: Cute Baby Elephant
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: a chubby cartoon baby elephant with big sparkly eyes, oversized floppy ears, a short stubby trunk lifted up happily, little round feet, and a tiny tail, sitting cheerfully

name: Elephant Splashing Water
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: a happy elephant standing in a shallow watering hole spraying water over its back with its raised trunk, arcs of splashing water droplets, ripples around its legs, and a cheerful open-mouthed expression

name: Mama and Baby Elephant
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: a large mother elephant gently curling her trunk to touch her small baby elephant walking close beside her, both standing on grassy ground, warm and loving expressions

name: Elephant Portrait
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: a close-up front-facing portrait of an elephant's head and face, two big floppy ears framing the head, kind eyes with long lashes, a wrinkly forehead, the trunk curling gently down the middle, and small tusks

name: Asian Elephant in the Jungle
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: a smaller Asian elephant with rounded smaller ears and a domed back walking through a leafy jungle, tall grass and a few palm fronds around it, a curled trunk reaching toward some hanging leaves

name: Trumpeting Elephant
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: an excited elephant raising its head and lifting its trunk high in the air as if trumpeting a loud call, ears flared out, front foot slightly lifted, mouth open in a joyful expression

name: Circus Elephant
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: a cheerful circus elephant balancing on a small round pedestal with its front legs lifted, wearing a decorative headpiece and a patterned blanket on its back, trunk curled upward in a playful pose

name: Elephant on the Savanna
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: an elephant walking across the African savanna, a flat-topped acacia tree to one side, low grassland, a round sun and a few clouds above, scattered tufts of grass at its feet

name: Elephant Eating Leaves
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: an elephant reaching its long trunk up to pull leafy branches from a tall tree, mouth slightly open, ears relaxed, a leafy branch held in the curl of the trunk, a calm content expression

name: Toddler Easy Elephant
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: a very simple round cartoon elephant made of big chunky shapes, a fat oval body, two large round ears, a short curved trunk, four thick stubby legs, and two dot eyes with a tiny smile, no fine details

name: Two Elephant Friends
subject: animals/elephant
prompt: two elephants standing side by side facing each other with their trunks linked together in the middle like a heart shape, big ears, friendly smiling faces, standing on grassy ground
